notes: This file is the app-facing high-accuracy toll matrix source.
Prices are sourced from official 2026 KGM and concessionaire tariff PDFs.
Matrix entries are exact tariff values where listed; fixed points are exact tariff entries.
Station coordinates are route-snapping aids and may be approximate for some corridors.
